tool.name: EnzyWizard Clean
tool.description: Clean a protein structure and generate multi-format files
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Clean**
Cleans a protein structure, removes heterogens, repairs missing heavy atoms, adds hydrogens, and converts the structure into a continuous protein chain with standardized residue numbering.
**Inputs** - Protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - Cleaned structure in CIF, PDB, and FASTA formats. - JSON report with residue mapping and clean statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-clean` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-clean
